mapper.select: SELECT * FROM telegram_config WHERE config_name = #{configName} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO telegram_config ( config_name, api_id, api_hash, bot_token, database_directory, temp_path, save_path, files_directory, use_test_dc, language_code, max_concurrent_tasks, download_types, proxy_enabled, proxy_scheme, proxy_hostname, proxy_port, proxy_username, proxy_password, enable_upload_file, upload_adapter, remote_dir, rclone_path, before_upload_file_zip, after_upload_file_delete, download_chat_ids, last_read_message_ids, saved_messages_enabled, saved_messages_last_scan_message_id, forward_listener_enabled, forward_listener_source_chat_ids, forward_listener_target_chat_id, forward_listener_last_message_id, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{configName}, #{apiId}, #{apiHash}, #{botToken}, #{databaseDirectory}, #{tempPath}, #{savePath}, #{filesDirectory}, #{useTestDc}, #{languageCode}, #{maxConcurrentTasks}, #{downloadTypes}, #{proxyEnabled}, #{proxyScheme}, #{proxyHostname}, #{proxyPort}, #{proxyUsername}, #{proxyPassword}, #{enableUploadFile}, #{uploadAdapter}, #{remoteDir}, #{rclonePath}, #{beforeUploadFileZip}, #{afterUploadFileDelete}, #{downloadChatIds}, #{lastReadMessageIds}, #{savedMessagesEnabled}, #{savedMessagesLastScanMessageId}, #{forwardListenerEnabled}, #{forwardListenerSourceChatIds}, #{forwardListenerTargetChatId}, #{forwardListenerLastMessageId}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE telegram_config SET config_name = #{configName}, api_id = #{apiId}, api_hash = #{apiHash}, bot_token = #{botToken}, database_directory = #{databaseDirectory}, temp_path = #{tempPath}, save_path = #{savePath}, files_directory = #{filesDirectory}, use_test_dc = #{useTestDc}, language_code = #{languageCode}, max_concurrent_tasks = #{maxConcurrentTasks}, download_types = #{downloadTypes}, proxy_enabled = #{proxyEnabled}, proxy_scheme = #{proxyScheme}, proxy_hostname = #{proxyHostname}, proxy_port = #{proxyPort}, proxy_username = #{proxyUsername}, proxy_password = #{proxyPassword}, enable_upload_file = #{enableUploadFile}, upload_adapter = #{uploadAdapter}, remote_dir = #{remoteDir}, rclone_path = #{rclonePath}, before_upload_file_zip = #{beforeUploadFileZip}, after_upload_file_delete = #{afterUploadFileDelete}, download_chat_ids = #{downloadChatIds}, last_read_message_ids = #{lastReadMessageIds}, saved_messages_enabled = #{savedMessagesEnabled}, saved_messages_last_scan_message_id = #{savedMessagesLastScanMessageId}, forward_listener_enabled = #{forwardListenerEnabled}, forward_listener_source_chat_ids = #{forwardListenerSourceChatIds}, forward_listener_target_chat_id = #{forwardListenerTargetChatId}, forward_listener_last_message_id = #{forwardListenerLastMessageId}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
